testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Playwright Auto Wait Functionality", "IPL Points Table Validation"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Verify Playwright Auto Wait Functionality &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/IPLPointTableValidation.feature:7&amp#27;[0m
Scenario: Verify Mobile Emulation Functionality &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/PlaywrightAdvancedFeatures.feature:10&amp#27;[0m

Scenario: Verify Browser Information &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/PlaywrightAdvancedFeatures.feature:19&amp#27;[0m
Scenario: Verify Screenshot And Scroll Functionality &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/IPLPointTableValidation.feature:19&amp#27;[0m
Scenario: Verify IPL Table Data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/IPLPointTableValidation.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser scrolls to the bottom of the page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_search_for_team()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser fetches the top IPL team&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_should_see_as_the_top_team()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTop IPL team should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.top_ipl_team_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.system-out: Mobile view launched successfully &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches IPL website in mobile view&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m Running on browser: firefox &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser runs the framework on browser&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PlaywrightAdvancedFeaturesStepDef.user_runs_the_framework_on_browser()&amp#27;[0m Page Title: IPL 2026 Points Table | Team Standings & Rankings | IPLT20 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mIPL website should launch successfully&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PlaywrightAdvancedFeaturesStepDef.ipl_website_should_launch_successfully()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m Current Browser: firefox &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser gets current browser details&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PlaywrightAdvancedFeaturesStepDef.user_gets_current_browser_details()&amp#27;[0m Browser information fetched successfully &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mBrowser information should be displayed successfully&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.PlaywrightAdvancedFeaturesStepDef.browser_information_should_be_displayed_successfully()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Cross Browser Execution", "Playwright Advanced Features Demonstration"](5)
testcase.system-out:
&amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser scrolls to the bottom of the page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_search_for_team()&amp#27;[0m [Batsman, Indian,
] [, ] [] [ 3 , , SRH , 12, 7, 5, 0, 0.331, 2418/237.1, 2295/232.4, 14, LWLWW ] [ 4 , , PBKS , 13, 6, 6, 1, 0.227, 2511/232.0, 2522/238.0, 13, LLLLL ] &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints the IPL points table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_the_ipl_points_table()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTotal IPL teams should be greater than 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.total_ipl_teams_should_be_greater_than_0()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTop IPL team points should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.top_ipl_team_points_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTeam &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be present in the table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.team_should_be_present_in_the_table(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m RCB GT SRH PBKS CSK RR DC KKR MI LSG &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints all IPL team names&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_all_ipl_team_names()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser captures screenshot with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ipl-points-table"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_captures_screenshot_with_name(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
